loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy consumed this month; per-phase energy, subsidy limits, and SEC are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power profiles over the last 7 days; rated and contracted power reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing HV input energy and derived losses — this meter has no LV output sensor to measure output energy.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing load factor % as a proxy for load profile deviation; event counts and explicit expected range bounds are not measured by this asset's meter.
